Uses of Class
algatorgraph.Edge

    • Uses of Edge in algatorgraph

      Methods in algatorgraph that return Edge 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      Edge<V,​W> Graph.addEdge​(V vertex1, V vertex2)
      Adds an edge connecting the specified vertices, creating and returning a new edge.
      Edge<V,​W> Graph.getEdge​(V vertex1, V vertex2)
      Returns the edge connecting the specified vertices.
      Edge<V,​W> Graph.removeEdge​(V vertex1, V vertex2)
      Removes the edge connecting the specified vertices.
      Methods in algatorgraph that return types with arguments of type Edge 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      java.util.Set<Edge<V,​W>> Graph.edgeSet()
      Returns the set of all edges in the graph.
      java.util.Set<Edge<V,​W>> Graph.edgesOf​(V v)
      Returns the set of edges connected to the specified vertex.
      java.util.Set<Edge<V,​W>> Graph.getAllEdges​(V vertex1, V vertex2)
      Returns all edges connecting the specified vertices.
      java.util.function.Supplier<Edge<V,​W>> Graph.getEdgeSupplier()
      Not implemented.
      java.util.Set<Edge<V,​W>> Graph.incomingEdgesOf​(V vertex)
      Returns the set of edges incoming to the specified vertex.
      java.util.Set<Edge<V,​W>> Graph.outgoingEdgesOf​(V vertex)
      Returns the set of edges outgoing from the specified vertex.
      java.util.Set<Edge<V,​W>> Graph.removeAllEdges​(V vertex1, V vertex2)
      Removes all edges connecting the specified vertices.
      Methods in algatorgraph with parameters of type Edge 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      boolean Graph.addEdge​(V vertex1, V vertex2, Edge<V,​W> edge)
      Adds the specified edge to the graph, connecting the specified vertices.
      boolean Graph.containsEdge​(Edge<V,​W> edge)
      Checks if the graph contains the specified edge.
      V Graph.getEdgeSource​(Edge<V,​W> edge)
      Returns the source vertex of the specified edge.
      V Graph.getEdgeTarget​(Edge<V,​W> edge)
      Returns the target vertex of the specified edge.
      double Graph.getEdgeWeight​(Edge<V,​W> edge)
      Returns the weight of the specified edge.
      boolean Graph.removeEdge​(Edge<V,​W> e)
      Removes the specified edge from the graph.
      void Graph.setEdgeWeight​(Edge<V,​W> edge, double weight)
      Sets weight if W is of type Double, Integer, Float, Long, Short, Byte, otherwise throws exception
      void Graph.setEdgeWeight​(Edge<V,​W> edge, W weight)
      Sets edge weight
      Method parameters in algatorgraph with type arguments of type Edge 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      boolean Graph.removeAllEdges​(java.util.Collection<? extends Edge<V,​W>> edges)
      Removes all specified edges from the graph.
